value.value: Cannot update capacity of a deactivated venue
Cannot remove a task that is in progress
Can only start processing pending imports
Can only complete an import that is parsing
Can only fail an import that is parsing
Can only retry a failed import
Can only complete a pending followup
Can only reschedule a pending followup
Can only cancel a pending followup
